etymology.description: 同(同) (tóng, "same; together") signifies unity or being alike, while 城(城) (chéng, "city") refers to a town or urban area. Combined, 同城 (tóngchéng) intuitively represents 'within the same city', suggesting locality or community.
etymology.interpretation: 同(同) (tóng, "same; together") evokes the idea of uniformity or being in unison. 城(城) (chéng, "city") conveys the physical space of an urban area. Thus, the combination refers to the concept of being in the same urban space, highlighting a shared locality or community context.

examples.chinese: 我在同城网(我在同城網)上找到了一个好工作。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ zài Tóngchéng wǎng shàng zhǎodào le yī gè hǎo gōngzuò.
examples.english: I found a good job on the 58.com site.

examples.chinese: 同城平台(同城平台)提供了许多租房信息(提供了許多租房信息)。
examples.pinyin: Tóngchéng píngtái tígōng le xǔduō zūfáng xìnxī.
examples.english: The 58.com platform provides a lot of rental information.

examples.chinese: 我们利用同城(我們利用同城)发布了二手物品的广告(發布了二手物品的廣告)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen lìyòng Tóngchéng fābù le èrshǒu wùpǐn de guǎnggào.
examples.english: We used 58.com to post advertisements for second-hand items.
